message:
refactor(abi): migrate sysinfo/process-group/priority/sigqueue syscalls

Uses existing wrappers to migrate 7 more libc::syscall calls:
- sysinfo: sys_sysinfo
- getpgrp/setpgrp: sys_getpgrp/sys_setpgid
- getpriority/setpriority: sys_getpriority/sys_setpriority
- sigqueue: sys_getpid/sys_getuid for caller info

Remaining libc::syscall count: 142 (149 → 142).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
